name: Stigfinnare
short_description: Stigfinnare is an action-shooter, where crazy men running with a hairdryer and kill each other to get some energy, then throw a boomerang to switch between teams and then fall to the the ocean.
detailed_description:
Early-Access-Purchase reward

Early-Access-Purchase will give you exclusive visual content for customizing charscters.


About the Game

Learn to improvise during a fight with an opponent in Stigfinnare. Players on 5 different maps with their tasks and features.


You will always get a new experience playing this game because everything is random here.


Defense a hill with a hairdryer on KOTH map, create your minefield at Trapdoor map, get into enemy bases and steal resources at Electrize map.


Fight in a team or split to get the points needed to change your character.


You can play with your friends in private lobbies.


In this game you will find:
Battle for energy at map "Electrize"
Detecting of enemy positions at map "Destruction"
Making decisions fast to reach the finish line first, or turn and try luck on Maze map
Creating strategies with set traps on Trapdoor map
Epic battles with a hairdryer and blowing off enemies from platforms on KOTH map
Hide&Seek on Camouflage map
All this you can do in a network game.
